questions.question: What is the difference between a presentational component and a container component?
questions.expectedAnswer: A presentational component is concerned with how things look -- it receives data via props and renders UI. A container component is concerned with how things work -- it manages state, fetches data, and passes it to presentational components.
questions.rubric: Must distinguish rendering concern from data/logic concern

questions.question: Why is accessibility a first-class concern rather than an afterthought?
questions.expectedAnswer: Accessibility is a professional and ethical obligation. If users with disabilities cannot use the software, it is not complete. It is also a legal requirement in many jurisdictions. Building it in from the start is cheaper than retrofitting.
questions.rubric: Must frame accessibility as non-optional and explain why
